texto: Sir Bedevere: "Tell me, what do you do with witches?" Crowd: "Burn, burn them up!" Sir Bedevere: "And what do you burn apart from witches?" Villager: "More witches!
autor: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Monty Python and the Holy Grail que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Sir Bedevere: "Tell me, what do you do with witches?" Crowd: "Burn, burn them up!" Sir Bedevere: …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, humour, monty-python, com foco em monty-python e witches.
